title: durio acutifolius
intro: Durio acutifolius, also known as the catjang or durian, is a species of fruit-bearing tree native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The fruit and leaves of the durio acutifolius plant have been used to treat digestive problems, fever, and infections, and have been shown to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in traditional medicine, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, although further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of these preparations.
